data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence indicates that multiple bookings can occur under the same offer, but it does not explicitly confirm that all admissions roll up under the same offer/sellable identity as required. The linked use case mentions unified reporting, yet the prior step evidence does not provide sufficient checks or validations to confirm that all admissions are reported under a single identity. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding the requirement's fulfillment.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming that all admissions roll up under the same offer/sellable identity.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
